
=== RATING SWING: BEFORE vs AFTER ===

Old: K_SINGLES=24, K_DOUBLES=48, marginWeight=0.1, partnerGap=0.75, lossBlend=0.75, maxRatio=2.0
New: K_SINGLES=36, K_DOUBLES=64, marginWeight=0.15, partnerGap=0.5, lossBlend=1.0, maxRatio=4.0

Singles even 1500 vs 1500, 11-10
  Old: pool 13 | winners     +13 | losers     -13
  New: pool 20 | winners     +20 | losers     -20
  Pool change: +7 points

Singles upset 1200 vs 1500, 11-9
  Old: pool 23 | winners     +23 | losers     -23
  New: pool 36 | winners     +36 | losers     -36
  Pool change: +13 points

Singles upset 1200 vs 1500, 11-2
  Old: pool 25 | winners     +25 | losers     -25
  New: pool 41 | winners     +41 | losers     -41
  Pool change: +16 points

Doubles even 1500+1500 vs 1500+1500, 11-10
  Old: pool 26 | winners +13 / +13 | losers -13 / -13
  New: pool 35 | winners +18 / +17 | losers -18 / -17
  Pool change: +9 points

Doubles upset 1200+1200 vs 1500+1500, 11-9
  Old: pool 45 | winners +23 / +22 | losers -23 / -22
  New: pool 63 | winners +32 / +31 | losers -32 / -31
  Pool change: +18 points
